20:["$","section",null,{"className":"pp-section","id":"trajectory","children":[["$","h2",null,{"children":"Yield trajectory"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"about-prose","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Over the past 30 days, the vault delivered positive yields on 14 out of 14 days. You deposit ETH, and the vault routes capital through the Aerodrome strategy on your behalf - harvesting rewards, swapping them back to ETH, and redepositing without manual steps."}]]}],["$","details","2",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Where does the yield come from?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Yield is composed of: 6.42% from AERO. Spread is small, suggesting the rate has been steady."}]]}],["$","details","4",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"How much is currently deposited?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Total value locked sits at $3K right now. TVL changes as users deposit and withdraw; we update the figure every hour from the chain."}]]}],["$","details","5",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"What are the strategy risks?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["No DeFi yield strategy is risk-free. The main vectors that apply to"," ","ETH Aerodrome"," are ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"smart-contract risk"}]," (a bug or upgrade in the vault or the underlying ","Aerodrome"," protocol could cause loss of funds), ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"oracle risk"}]," (mis-priced price feeds can drain a strategy in a single block),"," ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"liquidity risk"}]," (large withdrawals at the wrong moment can clip the share-price), ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"depeg risk"}]," (the underlying ","ETH"," de-pegging from its target value), and"," ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"governance risk"}]," (admin keys, parameter changes, fee switches). Risk levels we display on the site are editorial classifications, not a quantitative model. The full framework, including what each tier means, how we score, and the open questions we leave on the table, lives on the"," ",["$","$L8",null,{"href":"/risk-framework","children":"risk framework page"}],"."]}]]}]]}]]}]
